channel.title: Metadata on David Hamp-Gonsalves
channel.description: Recent content in Metadata on David Hamp-Gonsalves

item.title: Injecting Live Metadata with Wowza (1/3)
item.description:
This is the first post in a series about injecting JSON based metadata into a live RTP streams using Wowza Media Server, Adobe Flex and OSMF.

What We’re Building

Over the course of these posts I’ll cover how to trigger a event with associated JSON data from a flash object via a NetConnection which then in turn cause Wowza to inject the related data into the live RTP media stream and then finally to listen for and handle that event on the client side OSMF based video player.

item.title: Live Metadata Handling Using OSMF (3/3)
item.description:
This is the third post in a series about injecting JSON based metadata into a live RTP streams using Wowza Media Server, Adobe Flex and OSMF.

What We’ve Built

So far in the previous posts(1,2) we setup Wowza and created a module which will inject our JSON metadata into our live RTP stream. Then we created a flash object to trigger the event injection with our metadata from the browser.
